raw.official description: Winston now throws his barrier forward when used.
raw.ability details: * Removed in Reign of Talon Season 1

abilities.name: Chain Lightning

raw.shot type: [[File:Icon-ability.tacticalvisor.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Hitscan|Hitscan ]] Hitscan
raw.official description: Fully charged Secondary Fire hits bounce to up to 2 additional targets.
raw.ability details: * Can bounce to or from any damageable [[objects]], excluding [[barrier]]s. * Bounces target the nearest enemy. Heroes are not prioritized. * Bounces cannot return to the initial target. * Unlike the initial hit, the bounces are affected by [[armor]]. * The damage of the bounces is amplified by [[File:Baptiste-ability4.png|sub|link=Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Baptiste#Amplification Matrix|Amplification Matrix]] if the initial shot goes through. The bounces alone going through are not amplified.

raw.official description: Winston gains 10% movement speed for each enemy damaged by his primary fire, up to 30%.
During Primal Rage, Jump Pack's damage and area increase by up to 75% while airborne.
raw.ability details:
* It takes approximately 2 seconds of airtime to reach the maximum bonus.
* A meter is shown next to the crosshair while leaping.
* If Primal Rage is activated while already using Jump Pack, the damage increase starts accumulating from that moment onward.
* If Primal Rage ends while Winston is airborne, the landing does not gain the bonuses.

raw.official description: Tesla Cannon deals 100% more damage to deployable objects, such as turrets and barriers.
raw.ability details: * ''Removed in Season 18, integrated into base kit in Reign of Talon Season 2.'' * Affects all [[object]]s that can be damaged, including all [[barrier]]s. * Does not affect [[File:Ability-ashe4.png|sub|link=Ashe#B.O.B.|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Ashe#B.O.B.|B.O.B.]]. * The hit markers will glow in yellow when damaging an object.

abilities.name: Jump Pack
shot_type: [[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect [[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement

raw.shot type:
[[File:Ability-parah3.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Area of effect|Area of effect ]] Area of effect
[[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement
raw.official description: Leap forward into the air. Landing on an enemy damages them.
raw.ability details: * Cooldown starts immediately after activation. * The damage scales based on distance to target upon landing. * Enemies that collide with Winston mid-leap take 1 damage. * Enemies that are hit by the impact or collide with Winston mid-leap are knocked back. * Being stunned or slept temporarily prevents the landing effects from applying, but does not fully interrupt the leap. In other words, the landing damage and knockback will apply as long as the negative effects expire before he lands. * Winston can use (and charge) Tesla Cannon, melee and [[File:Ability-winston3.png|sub|link=Winston#Barrier Projector|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Winston#Barrier Projector|Barrier Projector]] and [[File:Ability-winston4.png|sub|link=Winston#Primal Rage|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Winston#Primal Rage|Primal Rage]] while leaping. * After using Jump Pack, a standard melee attack right before landing will cancel the melee animation while the damage of the attack is still applied. While the visual animation of the melee is cancelled, Winston still is unable to use his Tesla Cannon until 0.5 seconds after he used the melee attack. This makes using melee right before landing no more or less efficient than interrupting the Tesla Cannon with melee attacks while grounded. * View angle and use of directional inputs affect the jump length. ** To perform particularly short jumps with the Jump Pack, look straight ahead and press and hold backwards right before using the ability. To jump straight up, look straight up and press and hold backwards right before jumping.
* Cooldown starts immediately after activation. * Barrier becomes active after a 0.13 second delay.

raw.shot type: [[File:Ability_Moira_Coalescence.png|sub|40x40px|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Beam|Beam ]] Beam (multi-target)
raw.damage: 70 per second
raw.reload time: 1.5 seconds animation
raw.ability details: * Damage per second: 70 while firing (52.24 overall w/reload) * [[File:Ability-winston3.png|sub|link=Winston#Barrier Projector|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Winston#Barrier Projector|Barrier Projector]] and [[File:Ability-winston2.png|sub|link=Winston#Jump Pack|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Winston#Jump Pack|Jump Pack]] can be used without interrupting fire. * Ignores [[armor]] damage reduction.

abilities.name: Tesla Cannon Alt Fire

raw.shot type: [[File:Icon-ability.tacticalvisor.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Hitscan|Hitscan ]] Hitscan
raw.official description: Hold to charge, release to fire focused electricity
raw.cast time:
0.3 seconds (to min charge)
0.85 second (to full charge)
0.75 recovery
raw.dps:
14.67, continuous fire at minimum charge
37.5, continuous fire at max charge 19.35, continuous fire with max hold
raw.ability details: * Damage per second: ** 14.67, continuous fire at minimum charge ** 37.5, continuous fire at max charge ** 19.35, continuous fire with max hold * The amount of ammo drained increases as the ability is charged, up to 12. * The cannon automatically fires 1.5 seconds after reaching maximum charge. * [[File:Ability-winston2.png|sub|link=Winston#Jump Pack|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Winston#Jump Pack|Jump Pack]] can be used while charging without interrupting it. * Pressing primary fire cancels the charge, and activating [[File:Ability-winston3.png|sub|link=Winston#Barrier Projector|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Winston#Barrier Projector|Barrier Projector]] or using melee resets it. * Charging is interrupted if Winston is [[stunned]] or [[knocked down]]. * If the charging is interrupted or reset through any means, any ammo that went into charging the shot is consumed. * Ignores [[armor]] damage reduction.

raw.shot type: [[File:Quick_melee.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Melee|Melee ]] Melee
raw.official description: Gain immense health, but you can only leap and punch enemies.
raw.fire rate: 1 swing per 0.656 seconds
raw.ability details: * Winston's maximum health is increased by 700 and his health and armor are fully restored upon activation, resulting in 1175 total hit points (1325 in role queue): 975 [[health]] (1125 in role queue) and 200 [[armor]]. ** This HP restoration does not count as healing, and cannot be prevented by [[anti-heal]] effects. ** If Winston has more than 200 health (350 in role queue) at the end of the duration, it becomes 200 (350 in role queue). If he has any armor, it is transferred over. (E.g. 700 health, 50 armor becomes 200 health, 50 armor. 550 health, 0 armor becomes 200 health, 0 armor.) * [[File:Ability-winston2.png|sub|link=Winston#Jump Pack|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Winston#Jump Pack|Jump Pack]]'s cooldown is reset upon activation and when Primal Rage ends and lowered to 2 seconds while Primal Rage is active. * [[File:Ability-winston3.png|sub|link=Winston#Barrier Projector|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Winston#Barrier Projector|Barrier Projector]] and [[File:Ability-winston1.png|middle|link=Winston#Tesla Cannon|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Winston#Tesla Cannon|Tesla Cannon]] cannot be used during Primal Rage. * Melee attacks during Primal Rage have a wide arc and greatly increased knockback. ** The swings alternate direction, starting counter-clockwise. ** The hitbox of the attack lingers slightly longer at the end location of the swing. * [[File:Ability-winston1.png|middle|link=Winston#Tesla Cannon|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Winston#Tesla Cannon|Tesla Cannon]]'s ammunition is restored when the ultimate ends. * Primal Rage's [[movement speed]] buff does not count towards global movement speed buff cap.

fire_rate.raw: 1 swing per 0.656 seconds
